sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 25 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.28 2. For order on CMA No.100/2025 3. For hearing of main case 13.04.2026 Barrister Ahsan Ali Shah, advocate for the applicant When confronted learned counsel for the applicant states that the questions proposed herein are squarely covered against the applicant department by virtue of judgment of honourable Supreme Court in Millat Tractor’s case reported as 2024 SCMR 700. In view hereof learned counsel states that this reference application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
